title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
short_info: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Rourkela. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age Relaxation: Relaxed up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female; 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer).

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech / M.E. / M. Tech. [R] / M.S. [R] (after B. Tech / B.E.) in CSE / IT / B.Tech (AI and ML), B. Tech / B.E, M. Sc.
qualification.details: M. Tech / M.E. / M. Tech. [R] / M.S. [R] (after B. Tech / B.E.) in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) / IT/B.tech (AI and ML) with GATE score and 60% marks or 6.5/10 CGPA at both B.E. / B. Tech and M.E. / M. Tech levels. B. Tech / B.E. in CSE with GATE score in CS/IT/AI & DS and CGPA above 7.0 / 10 or marks above 65%. M. Sc. (with GATE) in Computer Science / Information Technology.

salary_details.details: INR 37,000.00 /- per month for Year 1 & 2 INR 42,000.00 /- per month for Year 3

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project need Walk-in (offline) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is 31-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in the NIT Rourkela recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification includes M. Tech / M.E. / M. Tech. [R] / M.S. [R] in CSE/IT/AI and ML with GATE score, or B. Tech / B.E. in CSE with GATE score, or M. Sc. (with GATE) in Computer Science / Information Technology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position is Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, depending on the year of service.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their application and documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on merit and project needs, followed by a walk-in (offline) interview.

faq.question: Q9. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in (offline) interview for the Junior Research Fellow position is scheduled for 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
